assignment_description:
God Created Light and the World Around Us
⍞ Materials: Bible Story Handbook

PREP: If you haven't read the Introduction section on p.13-30, please do that. Prior to this lesson, read lessons 1-2, p.33-37.

➜ INTRO
This year we will be reading true stories from the Bible that show us who God is and what he is like. This is his story of how he created a people with whom he could dwell and have a relationship.

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
Genesis 1:1-19 (Stop after several verses to have student narrate.)

➜ VIEW & DISCUSS
Talk about what was created each day.
∞ Art Print Link: Creation Window

God Made Animals and People
⍞ Materials: Bible Story Handbook

PREP: Read lessons 3-4 p.37-42

➜ RECAP
What did you read about Creation last time?

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
Genesis 1:20-31 (Stop after several verses to have student narrate.)

➜ VIEW & DISCUSS
How does this artwork compare with the picture you imagined?
∞ Image Link: The Garden of Eden by Jan Brueghel the Elder

• ILLUSTRATE - Draw a scene from the story using watercolor or another medium such as chalk, pastels, or crayons.
